outlook_paragraph: Continental Resources (CTRA) shows reduced drilling activity heading into Q3 2021, with only 8 active sites detected via SAR and a 20% decline in relative activity compared to recent trends. The low WTI environment averaging $43.93 and a realized price differential of $0.78 below benchmark further constrain revenue potential. With only 40% of production tied to the actively monitored segment and minimal new pad activation, the deterministic forecast of $657.3M reflects constrained growth momentum and subdued near-term outlook.
